title: GET /api/projects/[id]/branches API Route
summary: Created GET /api/projects/[id]/branches route to enable fetching available GitHub branches for a project.
business_context: The frontend needs to display available GitHub branches in the changelog UI. This endpoint provides the backend integration point.
affected_users: All users viewing changelog with branch context awareness
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns 401 Unauthorized when user lacks access
Endpoint returns 404 when project not found
Endpoint returns 200 with branches array when successful
